title: AI Adoption Gap: Businesses Are SLOWLY Catching Up! #shorts
summary: Advanced AI capabilities are developing faster than businesses can adopt them, with agentic AI seeing particularly slow enterprise uptake. This adoption gap represents missed opportunities for companies seeking transformative growth.
writeup: This short argues that AI capabilities are advancing faster than businesses can put them to use, creating an adoption gap. Agentic AI draws particular attention: enterprise uptake of AI agents is slow relative to what the technology can already do. The framing matters because the lag is presented as missed opportunity for companies pursuing transformative growth.
